entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oilseed and cash crop cultivated worldwide

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region accounting for 57.13% of the world's groundnut cultivation area

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region accounting for 37.24% of the world's groundnut cultivation area

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A widespread problem in groundnut-producing countries that makes produce unfit for consumption

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions under which groundnut is grown and aflatoxin contamination is prevalent

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The yield of the crop, which is not affected by aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: AFLATOXIN-PRODUCING FUNGUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for producing aflatoxins in groundnut
